info.english_meaning: to anoint to polish to smear

upasarga_meanings.meaning: tela malanA mAna karanA ekatra karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pra SarDAya mArutAya svaBAnava imAM vAcamanajA' (f0 5541) prAnaja=prANkta=prApayata
'prAYjanAt uta parRaDeH' (aTarva0 465) prAYjanAt pralepAt
'aYjate vyaYjate samajate' (aTarva॰18.3.18) samaYjate=samaYjanti samyag aYjanti
'devAnyajantAvftuTA samaYjataH' (f॰2.3.7)
'samajantu viSvedevAH samApo hfdayAni nO' (f॰10.85.47) samaYjantu=saMyuYjantu =sampfYcantu
'asmA idu saptimiva SravasyendrAyArkaM juhvA samaYje' (f॰1.61.5 aTarva॰20.35.5) samaYje=saNgataM karomi

'aYjate vyaYjate kratuM rihanti laGunA'ByaYjate' (aTarva0 18318) vyaYjate=vyaYjanti lOkikAdaYjanAdanyena prakAregAYjantItyarTaH taTA ca tEttirIyiRa Amananti--dakziRaM pUrvamANkte savyaM hi pUrvaM manuzyA AYjata' (tE0 saM0 6116) iti
'SuBrA (marutaH) vyaYjata Sriye' (f0 8725) vyaYjata=prAkASanta adIpyanta
'jihvA kaTaM te hfdayaM vyanakti' (BA0 saBA0 642) vyanakti vyaktI karoti vivfRoti pratyakzayati
'dEvamAnuzayoradya vyaktA vyaktirBavizyati' (rA0 22318) vyaktirBedaH prabaladurbalaviveka ityarTaH
'lagno'gniScAmarezu prakAmaM vyajyate na sma sEnyEH' (SiSu0 1834) na vyajyate sma na vivicyate sma na vivicya jYAyate sma
'vikrameRa ca vAkyESca vyaktiM vAM nopalakzaye' (rA0 41231) vyaktirBedaH
'vyaktiM BajantyApagAH' (SA0 78) vyaktiM Bajanti dfSyatAM yAnti sPuwadarSanatAM gacCanti
'vyaYjanamAtraM tattasyABiDAnasya Bavati' (ni0 713) vyaYjanaM viSezaRam
'A no daDikAH paTyAmanaktu' (f0 7445) Anaktu mrakzayatu SoDayatu mArzwu samI karotu
'A vAM nakzanto adraya AYjan' (f0 6633) satkAreRa pratIcCanti sabahumAnaM pratigfhRanti
'akziRI AYjya' (ASva0 gf0 46) akte kftvetyAha
'yaTA makzA idaM maDu nyaYjanti maDAvaDi' (aTarva0 9117) nyaYjanti nilimpanti
'tvazwA gnAsvantarnyAnaje' (f0 11614) nyAnaje=antarviveSa antardave
'meDAM me vizRurnyanaktvAsan' (aTarva0 18311) nyanaktu saMyojayatu Asani muKe
'praticIna ANgiraso'Dyakto naH purohitaH' (aTarva0 1016) aDyaktaH sajjaH sannadDaH aDyakza iti pAWAntaram
'aYjate vyaYjate samaYjate kratuM rihanti maDunA ByaYjate' (aTarva0 18318) aByaYjate navanItena mADuryopetenAByaktaSarIraM kurvantItyarTaH
'navanItenAByaYjanti' (E0 brA0 13) aByaYjanti mrakzayanti anulimpanti
'aYjAno ajarEraBi' (f0 284) ukto'rTaH
'BArasyodvahanArTaM ca raTAkzo'Byajyate yaTA' (sOndara0 1412) aByajyate upasnihyate
'akto'Byakto vezwityupavezwitI' (Apa0 Da0 182) akto'YjanenAkzRoraByaktastElena vezwitI vezwitaSirAH kawipradeSo dvitIyena vAsasA vezwito yasya sa upavezwitI
'pratyanakttyavadAnAni' (Sa0 brA0 5136)
'narASaMsaH prati DAmAnyaYjan' (f0 232)
'sruveRa kapAlAni pratyajya' (Apa0 SrO0 23113) kapAlAni pratyekam aNktvA mrakzayitvA
'uparizwAdaByajyADastAdupAnakti' (Apa0 SrO0 23114) upAnakti mrakzayati upalimpati upadegDi leperTe upena DAtoH sAhacaryamitIdampara upasargayogo'rTe tu viSezaM na karoti
'yaTA'kzo'nupAktaH' (tE0 saM0 2633) anupAkta upAYjanarahitaH
'saMmArjanopAYjanena sekenolleKanena ca gavAM ca parivAsena BUmiH SuDyati paYcaBiH' (manu0 5124).. upAYjanamupalepaH
